summary: Created pulse_dashboard_sync.py - scans N5/builds/ for Pulse and legacy formats, generates dashboard-compatible JSON. Supports CLI with --output, --dry-run options. Handles timestamp parsing, drop counting, status detection, and graceful error handling.
test_results: Ran against N5/builds/, found 3 Pulse builds (prompt-to-skill, pulse-dashboard-integration, pulse-validation) and 9 legacy builds. All success criteria met: script runs without errors, --help shows usage, output JSON validates, Pulse builds show correct drop counts (e.g., prompt-to-skill: 3 complete, 3 running, 1 pending, 42% progress), legacy builds marked with format: 'legacy'. Active builds sorted first, then by last_activity descending.
